title: Rapid Leaf Decay
description: A basic modification for Minecraft that enhances the rate of leaf decay once you've felled a tree. Typically, it accelerates the process, resulting in the removal of all leaves within approximately 2 seconds.
body:
## The Rapid Leaf Decay plugin is not in any way related to the [Rapid Leaf Decay](https://modrinth.com/mod/rapid-leaf-decay) modification! These are two different things made by two different people! The convergence of names is accidental.

A basic plugin for Paper/Spigot that enhances the rate of leaf decay once you've cut down a tree. Typically, it accelerates the process, resulting in the removal of all leaves within approximately 2 seconds. It functions practically the same as the [Fast Leaf Decay mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fast-leaf-decay).
